Activate test: "should maintain a block still life (2x2 square) unchanged across a generation"

Implementation file: src/game-of-life.ts

The implementation already has the full Game of Life logic. This test should verify that a 2x2 block [[0,0], [1,0], [0,1], [1,1]] remains unchanged after one generation.

Use a helper to sort the results for comparison: sort both arrays and use toEqual. Or use expect.arrayContaining with length check.

The test should verify: nextGeneration([[0,0], [1,0], [0,1], [1,1]]) produces exactly [[0,0], [1,0], [0,1], [1,1]] (in any order).

Since the implementation already handles this correctly, the test will likely pass immediately. That's fine.

NOTE: Test 9 is being activated in parallel by another agent.
